auth_required_lattice.order: Impossible ⊏ {Signature, Proof} ⊏ Either ⊏ None (None is the TOP/widest)
auth_required_lattice.note: is_attenuation(held, req) = req.is_narrower_or_equal(held); see the None cap-badge anomaly in HORIZONLOG

refusal_taxonomy.cap_gate: by_executor=false — required ⊄ held, refused before any turn (the anti-ghost tooth)
refusal_taxonomy.executor: by_executor=true — a kernel guarantee fired (conservation, non-amplification, a permissions gate)
